name: terminal-plus
description: AI-powered airport companion for Singapore Changi Airport. Provides amenity recommendations, flight context, curated transit routes, and disruption alerts across T1, T2, T3, T4, and Jewel.

tools.name: get_airport_context
tools.description: Get terminal, gate, boarding time, and travel context for a flight at Singapore Changi Airport (SIN).

date.description: Flight date YYYY-MM-DD. Defaults to today Singapore time.

tools.output: Airport context object with terminal, gate, urgency, inter-terminal travel info

tools.name: get_recommendations
tools.description: Get personalized amenity recommendations at Singapore Changi Airport by vibe, terminal, and time constraints.

terminal.description: Terminal code: SIN-T1, SIN-T2, SIN-T3, SIN-T4, SIN-JEWEL

tools.output: Ranked list of amenities with editorial notes, scores, descriptions, and app links

tools.name: get_disruption_status
tools.description: Check flight disruption status at Singapore Changi Airport. Returns delay info, gate changes, and suggested actions.
tools.output: Disruption details with severity, delay minutes, and suggested passenger actions

tools.name: get_route
tools.description: Get a time-sequenced route through Singapore Changi Airport. Returns ordered stops with editorial notes, durations, and timing. Best used after get_airport_context to know the passenger terminal and time budget. Returns curated routes for known flight patterns (e.g. QF1) or dynamically composed routes.

arrival_terminal.description: Terminal the passenger arrived at, e.g. SIN-T1, SIN-T3

departure_terminal.description: Terminal departing from. Defaults to arrival_terminal if same-terminal transit.

time_budget_minutes.description: Total usable minutes between now and when passenger needs to be at departure gate.

flight_number.description: If known, used to match curated route templates (e.g. QF1, SQ322).

vibe.description: Preferred vibe to weight stop selection.

tools.output: Ordered stops with durations, editorial notes, gate buffer, and timing constraints. route_type is 'curated' or 'dynamic'.

data_sources.amenities: Curated database of 372+ verified SIN amenities with editorial notes
data_sources.routes: 6 curated route templates covering T1-T4 with editorial stops

trust_signals.no_hallucination: Agent only returns amenities verified in database. Never fabricates.
trust_signals.verified_hours: Opening hours sourced from official airport data
trust_signals.real_time_disruption: Flight data refreshed via AeroDataBox API
trust_signals.transit_safety: Always warns about Jewel immigration requirements

beta_notes: Currently covers Singapore Changi Airport only. Expanding to additional airports Q3 2026.
